key_topics: Development progress and memory leak issue
Staging environment selection for final integrations
Mobile app submission timeline and action items
key_decisions: Use the AWS staging environment for final integration testing
Liam will share the staging credentials securely via 1Password by tomorrow morning
Submit the app to the App Store and Google Play by next Friday
summary.summary: The team aligned on the upcoming mobile app launch, targeting next Friday for submission to the App Store and Google Play. Key development milestones are on track, with Alex addressing a minor memory leak on the login screen. The team decided to utilize AWS for final integration testing, and Liam will share credentials securely. Action items were assigned to all members to ensure testing, assets, and checklist preparation are completed ahead of the launch.

tasks.title: Fix memory leak on login screen
tasks.description: Resolve the minor memory leak identified on the login screen to ensure stability before final integration testing.

tasks.title: Share staging credentials securely
tasks.description: Distribute the AWS staging credentials securely to the team using 1Password.

tasks.title: Perform final integration testing
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive integration testing on the selected AWS staging environment.

tasks.title: Submit app to stores
tasks.description: Submit the finalized mobile app to both the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.

tasks.title: Prepare final checklist and assets
tasks.description: Ensure all launch checklists and design assets are prepared and finalized ahead of the scheduled submission.
